message:
fix: prevent panics and ensure absolute paths in error fallbacks

- agentmail/client.go: Add nil check in WithTimeout to prevent panic
- checkpoint/storage.go: Fallback to os.TempDir() when UserHomeDir fails
- config/config.go: Fallback to os.TempDir() in DefaultPath and DefaultProjectsBase
- robot/interrupt.go: Guard getLastMeaningfulOutput against maxLen < 4 panic
- session/storage.go: Return absolute path instead of relative when UserHomeDir fails

These fixes ensure robustness in containerized environments and edge cases
where the home directory is unavailable or returns empty.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
